title: How to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you know the frustration of being blocked by PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad due to geographic restrictions. You're not alone - thousands of creators face this problem, struggling to get paid for their digital products. But what if you could set up a digital store that accepts crypto payments, without needing PayPal or any other conventional payment processor? With NOWPayments, you can, and this guide will show you how.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment processing systems often fail creators in restricted countries, but NOWPayments offers a solution that bypasses these limitations. By using cryptocurrency, you can receive payments from anywhere in the world, without the need for a conventional bank account or payment processor. This method works because it's decentralized, secure, and global, allowing you to focus on creating and selling your digital products, rather than worrying about how to get paid.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your NOWPayments digital store, you'll need a few basic things. First, you'll need a digital product to sell, such as an ebook, course, or software. You'll also need a crypto wallet to receive payments, and a basic understanding of how cryptocurrency works. Don't worry if you're new to crypto - it's easy to learn, and NOWPayments provides a user-friendly interface to help you get started.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With NOWPayments, setting up your payment and delivery pipeline is straightforward. You'll need to create a store, add your digital products, and configure your payment settings. This includes choosing which cryptocurrencies you want to accept, such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT. You'll also need to set up automated delivery, so that your customers receive their products instantly after payment. The Core Shop Engine, included in the Full Stack Bundle, makes this process easy and efficient.
Ditch PayPal and start accepting crypto payments today!
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your store and configured your payment settings, you're ready to go live and start making sales. This is the exciting part - you'll be able to receive payments from customers all over the world, and deliver your digital products instantly. To make your first sale, you'll need to promote your store and products to potential customers, using social media, advertising, or other marketing channels. With the right marketing strategy, you can start generating revenue and growing your business.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows and you start making more sales, you'll need to scale your system to handle increased traffic and demand. This includes monitoring your store's performance, analyzing customer behavior, and optimizing your marketing strategy. With the Admin Dashboard, included in the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have access to real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easy to track your store's performance and make data-driven decisions.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

To receive crypto payments for your digital products, you'll need to set up a crypto wallet and integrate it with your NOWPayments store. This allows you to accept payments in a variety of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. The payment process is fast and secure, with most transactions settling in under an hour, depending on the blockchain network.
Automated delivery means instant gratification for your customers!
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a comprehensive solution to setting up your NOWPayments digital store, check out the Full Stack Bundle, available for $79.99. This bundle includes everything you need to get started, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. You can purchase the Full Stack Bundle at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html, and start receiving crypto payments for your digital products today.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with your NOWPayments digital store, follow these steps: create a store and add your digital products, configure your payment settings and choose which cryptocurrencies to accept, set up automated delivery using the Core Shop Engine, promote your store and products to potential customers, and monitor your store's performance using the Admin Dashboard. With these steps, you'll be well on your way to receiving crypto payments and growing your business.
Scale your business with real-time analytics and transaction logs!
